title: DocSpec Property DSL Grammar
description: Formal grammar for @DocInvariant rule expressions used in DSTI.

grammar.description: EBNF grammar rules for the Property DSL.

operator.const: nullCheck | emptyCheck | blankCheck | sizeOp | inOp | betweenOp | matchesOp | comparisonOp | customOp

default.name: NOT_NULL
default.description: Asserts the field must not be null.

default.name: NOT_EMPTY
default.description: Asserts the collection or string field must not be empty.

default.name: NOT_BLANK
default.description: Asserts the string field must not be blank (null, empty, or whitespace).

default.name: SIZE
default.description: Asserts the size of a collection or string matches the comparator constraint.

default.name: IN
default.description: Asserts the field value is one of the listed values.

default.name: BETWEEN
default.description: Asserts the numeric field value is within the inclusive range.

default.name: MATCHES
default.description: Asserts the string field matches the given regex pattern.

default.name: GT
default.description: Asserts the field is greater than the given value.

default.name: GTE
default.description: Asserts the field is greater than or equal to the given value.

default.name: LT
default.description: Asserts the field is less than the given value.

default.name: LTE
default.description: Asserts the field is less than or equal to the given value.

default.name: EQ
default.description: Asserts the field is equal to the given value.

default.name: NEQ
default.description: Asserts the field is not equal to the given value.

default.name: CUSTOM
default.description: A custom invariant expression that does not match any built-in operator. Treated as free-form text.
default.example: transaction.amount must equal sum of line items
